title: The European project “Virtigation”: an opportunity to learn more about whitefly pests of vegetable crops and to update on strategies for their
description: A Horizon 2020 EU-funded project developing integrated solutions to control begomoviruses and tobamoviruses on cucurbits and tomatoes through advanced understanding of vector biology and plant–virus–vector interactions. The University of Catania will lead surveys and field trials to test insecticidal plant extracts, assess plant resistance to Bemisia tabaci MED, and integrate multiple whitefly control approaches.
